highlights: Improved task card format with clearer acceptance criteria
keep_doing: Tiny task card approach reducing scope drift
improve: Need to include design requirements for UI tasks
flow_suggestions: Add diagram requirement for complex multi-step tasks

improve: Error handling patterns could be more consistent
Should draw diagrams before complex flows
flow_suggestions: Coach task cards are good — keep this format

highlights: Caught race condition in payment flow
keep_doing: Testing against frozen contract, not moving target
improve: Need browser QA for UI tasks — unit tests miss visual bugs
flow_suggestions: Request design spec in task card when UI is involved
blockers: No design system to audit against

ceo.commentary: First formal retro. Team delivered well — 3/4 tasks completed. Quality score 7/10 — room to improve. Main takeaway: we need design audit pre-code and diagram-first architecture. These will be added to playbook v3.1.
product_insights: Contract template system is the right product direction — reduces friction
Layer 2/3 pipeline stability improving, ready for increased volume

action_items.action: Add design requirements section to task card
